goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'turkish' food and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '6 people' at '12:15' on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college' and should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve turkish food and should be in the centre
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 12:15 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college and should be in the same area as the restaurant
Make sure you get entrance fee
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
